title: Where Echoes Lie (WEL)
description: A massive tech and adventure overhaul where you must master magic and machinery to survive a world full of echoes.
body:
Where Echoes Lie (WEL)

By Luchito

Do you hear it? A whisper in the steam... an echo from the stone.
The world you remember is but a faint memory, a ghost of a simpler time. A new age has begun.

Welcome to Where Echoes Lie (WEL), a world built upon the bones of a forgotten age. The silence of eons is shattering, and as ancient powers awaken, you are here to witness their return. This is not a 'vanilla-plus' experience. It is a fundamental reimagining of Minecraft's core gameplay loops, designed to reward the bold, the creative, and the ingenious.

THIS IS NOT FROM THE BOOK

The world has been reborn with vast, breathtaking landscapes from Biomes O' Plenty. Beneath the surface, the earth groans with the weight of forgotten structures, from the colossal, puzzle-filled labyrinths of When Dungeons Arise to the completely reimagined strongholds and mineshafts from the full YUNG's Better Series.

Your adventure will take you far beyond the Overworld. Ascend to the divine islands of The Aether, descend into the prehistoric chasms of Alex's Caves, and confront the horrifying, pulsing depths of the Deeper and Darker. Each realm is populated by a menagerie of new life and legendary threats from Alex's Mobs and **Mowzie's Mobs**, while the atmospheric horrors of the **Whisperwoods** and **The Graveyard** stalk the nights.

To survive, you cannot rely on simple diamond tools. You must become a master of three distinct disciplines:

  • The **Tinker**, forging custom weapons and tools from a massive variety of alloys in the **Tinkers' Construct** smeltery.
  • The **Engineer**, building intricate, kinetic machinery and sprawling train networks with **Create**.
  • The **Archmage**, weaving custom spells in **Ars Nouveau** or delving into the high-tech industry of **Mekanism**.

This is a world of hostile beauty, of ancient mysteries and cutting-edge technology. It does not hold your hand. Your goals are your own. Can you conquer the horizons? Can you build a factory that tames the wilds? Can you master the arcane arts?

An Epic Experience Forged from Legendary Mods

This modpack is a carefully constructed love letter to the modding community, designed to create a single, cohesive, and deeply engaging experience.

Click to view the core features of your adventure...


⚔️ A World of Deep and Challenging Combat

  • Legendary Foes: Confront the terrifying, multi-staged boss encounters of Mowzie's Mobs, from the sun-chief Barakoa to the nigh-invulnerable Ferrous Wroughtnaut. Discover and hunt over 85 new creatures with Alex's Mobs, from the sky-whale Seo Teras to the cavern-dwelling Tremorsaurus.
  • A Custom Arsenal: Leave vanilla tools in the past. Master **Tinkers' Construct** to design and modify your own unique weapons and tools from a massive variety of materials. Expand your options further with the tactical variety of **Spartan Weaponry** and the modern firearms of **Scorched Guns**.
  • The Path of the Mage: Obliterate your foes with custom-crafted spells from **Ars Nouveau**. Combine glyphs of fire, lightning, and gravity to create screen-shattering magical attacks, or summon powerful magical allies to fight by your side.


🌍 An Age of Uncharted Exploration

  • Dungeons That Touch the Sky: Plunder hundreds of colossal, procedurally generated structures with When Dungeons Arise, including floating galleons, infested asylums, volcanic forge-shrines, and massive desert tombs.
  • Vanilla Reimagined: Experience vanilla structures as you've never seen them before with the complete **YUNG's Better Series**, overhauling Dungeons, Mineshafts, Strongholds, Ocean Monuments, Nether Fortresses, and more.
  • Realms Beyond: Your adventure will transcend the Overworld. Ascend to the divine islands of **The Aether**. Delve into the five massive, prehistoric biomes of **Alex's Caves**. Face the chilling abyss of the **Deeper and Darker**. Every realm offers unique challenges and bosses.


⚙️ The Dawn of an Industrial Revolution

  • Master the Machine: Engineer solutions to any problem with **Create**. Build kinetic contraptions powered by wind and steam, design sprawling factories with automated crafting, and construct intricate train networks to transport your goods.
  • The Ultimate Endgame: Advance beyond Create into the high-tech world of **Mekanism**. Pursue the sciences of fission and fusion, build digital miners, teleportation networks, and craft the near-invincible MekaSuit.
  • Digital Dominance: Conquer the chaos of a 190+ mod inventory with **Refined Storage**. Digitize millions of items into a searchable, craftable, computer-based network, making resource management a project in itself.

The Complete Mod List

This pack contains approximately 190 mods, including all required libraries and dependencies.

Technical Details & Requirements

  • Minecraft Version: `1.20.1`
  • Mod Loader: `Forge`
  • Required Forge Version: `47.4.3`
  • Java Version: `Java 17` is required to play.
  • Recommended RAM Allocation: **8GB** is highly recommended for a smooth experience, especially with shaders. 6GB is the absolute minimum. You can adjust this in your launcher's settings.
  • Shader Compatibility: This pack includes **Oculus**, allowing for the use of shaders. Shaders are optional but highly recommended on powerful PCs for the full atmospheric experience.
